concat.scalar:
🛠️ Your Tech Stack
You'll work with professional tools that real developers use:
FRONTEND (What users see):• HTML - Structure of your website• CSS - Styling and colors• JavaScript - Interactive features
BACKEND (Behind the scenes): • Node.js - Server that runs your chatbot • Express.js - Handles requests • SQLite -

Database to store information
AI & CLOUD: • IBM Watson Assistant - The AI brain • IBM Cloud - Where Watson lives
VERSION CONTROL: • Git - Track your code changes • GitHub - Share and collaborate
Don't worry if these sound complicated - we'll learn them step by step!
Want to know the timeline?

concat.scalar:
Week Project Timeline
WEEK 1: Foundation & Setup • Day 1: Get everything installed • Day 2: Customize your website design • Day 3: Connect IBM Watson AI • Day 4: Learn about the backend
WEEK 2: Building Features • Day 5: Add database for storing info • Day 6: Test everything and fix bugs
WEEK 3: Polish & Present • Day 7: Add personality to your chatbot •

Day 8: Create your presentation • Day 9: Present to everyone! 🎉
Team Size: 3 students per team
Each day builds on the previous one, so you'll see progress quickly! Need help getting started?

BEFORE YOU CODE: 1️⃣ Form your team of 3 students 2️⃣ Choose your chatbot domain 3️⃣ Brainstorm 10 questions it should answer
TECHNICAL SETUP: ✅ Install VS Code (code editor) ✅ Install Git (version control) ✅ Install Node.

js (runs your server) ✅ Create GitHub account ✅ Clone the project repository
YOUR FIRST TASKS: • Customize the website colors • Change the chatbot title • Add a welcome message • Make your first Git commit

concat.scalar:
**🚀 The Tech Plus P-TECH Project**
Over the next 3 weeks, you'll build your very own website with AI-powered chatbot from scratch!
Here's what makes it special:
✅ You choose the topic (Gaming, Health, Career, or your own idea) ✅ You customize everything (colors, design,

personality) ✅ You use real AI technology (IBM Watson) ✅ You work in teams of 3 ✅ You present your creation at the end
By the end, you'll have: • A working website with a chatbot • Real coding experience • A project for your portfolio • New skills in AI and web development
Ready to get started? Ask me "how do I begin?"

concat.scalar:
**🆘 Getting Help**


You have lots of support available!


YOUR TEAM:

• Work together - 3 brains are better than 1

• Share what you learn

• Help each other debug


YOUR SUPERVISOR:

• Ask questions anytime

• They'll guide you through problems

• They want you to succeed!


ONLINE RESOURCES:

• Project documentation

• IBM Watson guides

• Google and Stack Overflow


DEBUGGING TIPS:

1.

Read error messages carefully

2. Check the browser console (F12)

3. Try one change at a time

4. Don't be afraid to experiment!


Remember: Getting stuck is part of learning. Every developer faces bugs!


What else would you like to know?
